category_sources: Official PowerDNS docs identify this as PowerDNS Authoritative Server: https://docs.powerdns.com/authoritative/.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is PowerDNS Authoritative Server: https://docs.powerdns.com/authoritative/.
source_facts.name is pdns, the package name.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation for PowerDNS Authoritative Server is https://docs.powerdns.com/authoritative/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PowerDNS downloads page says source code is hosted on GitHub, and the official repository is https://github.com/PowerDNS/pdns.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an authoritative nameserver; official docs are for PowerDNS Authoritative Server: https://docs.powerdns.com/authoritative/.
